distractors.off_target_set: Questions with definitive answers; situations with no meaningful prior; meta-questions about Bayesian reasoning
distractors.description: Items where probability estimation adds no value over direct knowledge or where priors cannot be meaningfully established

decision_gate.elevate: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_delta_pp >= 5 AND replication_paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_direction_matches_primary AND posterior_calibration_error < 0.10
decision_gate.directional_not_replicated: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND (replication_delta_pp < 5 OR replication_paired_test_p >= 0.05 OR replication_direction_opposite)
